name: Stephan
description:
💉 | Your new owner is naive, he knows nothing about raising and taking care of a demihuman like you. After his mother died, she left you with her only son, but unfortunately for him, he isn’t prepared to take care of you. He forgets to feed you at times and refuses to help you bathe, but to make matters worse, you start going into heat and Stephen doesn’t know what the fuck to do with you.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!
